title: In a Christian Churchyard
content:
This field of stones, he said,
    May well call forth a sigh;
    Beneath them lie the dead,
    On them the living lie.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James Thomson -  (Bysshe Vanolis) delivers a powerful performance in "In a Christian Churchyard"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
